name: chr20_20q11_22_pericentric_SD_belt
description: 20q11.22 distal pericentric SD belt — the centromere-distal partner of the 20q11.21 inversion SD pair. Contains MAPRE1, EFCAB8, ASIP-related paralogs and inter-chromosomal SDs to chr20p11. One of the densest contiguous SD belts on chr20.

architecture.internal_structure: Mosaic of direct and inverted SDs of 50-300 kb at 95-99% identity; intra-chr20 duplicons to 20p11; embedded in the pericentric SD field that mediates inv(20) polymorphism.
